example_sentence.pinyin: Jìshù rényuán yǐjīng xiūfùle xìtǒng lòudòng.
example_sentence.english: Technicians have fixed the system vulnerability.

example_sentence.sentence: 我和同事們相處得很融洽。
example_sentence.pinyin: Wǒ hé tóngshìmen xiāngchǔ de hěn róngqià.
example_sentence.english: I get along very well with my colleagues.

example_sentence.sentence: 職場中需要不斷學習新技能。
example_sentence.pinyin: Zhíchǎng zhōng xūyào bùduàn xuéxí xīn jìnéng.
example_sentence.english: In the workplace, one needs to constantly learn new skills.

example_sentence.sentence: 搭捷運去台北101非常方便。
example_sentence.pinyin: Dā jiéyùn qù Táiběi 101 fēicháng fāngbiàn.
example_sentence.english: Taking the MRT to Taipei 101 is very convenient.

example_sentence.sentence: 公車大約每十分鐘有一班。
example_sentence.pinyin: Gōngchē dàyuē měi shí fēnzhōng yǒu yī bān.
example_sentence.english: The bus comes about every ten minutes.

example_sentence.sentence: 如果趕時間，可以叫計程車。
example_sentence.pinyin: Rúguǒ gǎn shíjiān, kěyǐ jiào jìchéngchē.
example_sentence.english: If you're in a hurry, you can call a taxi.

example_sentence.sentence: 便利商店可以繳費也可以寄件。
example_sentence.pinyin: Biànlì shāngdiàn kěyǐ jiǎofèi yě kěyǐ jìjiàn.
example_sentence.english: Convenience stores can be used for paying bills and sending packages.

example_sentence.sentence: 你可以去服務台詢問地圖。
example_sentence.pinyin: Nǐ kěyǐ qù fúwùtái xúnwèn dìtú.
example_sentence.english: You can ask for a map at the service desk.

example_sentence.sentence: 我想去郵局寄包裹到國外。
example_sentence.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng qù yóujú jì bāoguǒ dào guówài.
example_sentence.english: I want to go to the post office to send a package abroad.

example_sentence.sentence: 銀行的營業時間到下午三點半。
example_sentence.pinyin: Yínháng de yíngyè shíjiān dào xiàwǔ sān diǎn bàn.
example_sentence.english: The bank's business hours are until 3:30 PM.

example_sentence.sentence: 這附近哪裡有提款機可以領錢？
example_sentence.pinyin: Zhè fùjìn nǎlǐ yǒu tíkuǎnjī kěyǐ lǐngqián?
example_sentence.english: Where is there an ATM nearby to withdraw money?

example_sentence.sentence: 感冒的話，去家附近的診所看醫生就好。
example_sentence.pinyin: Gǎnmào de huà, qù jiā fùjìn de zhěnsuǒ kàn yīshēng jiù hǎo.
example_sentence.english: If you have a cold, just go to a clinic near your house to see a doctor.

example_sentence.sentence: 大醫院通常需要等很久。
example_sentence.pinyin: Dà yīyuàn tōngcháng xūyào děng hěnjiǔ.
example_sentence.english: Large hospitals usually require a long wait.

example_sentence.sentence: 你看過這間診所嗎？要先掛號喔。
example_sentence.pinyin: Nǐ kànguò zhè jiān zhěnsuǒ ma? Yào xiān guàhào ō.
example_sentence.english: Have you been to this clinic before? You need to register first.

example_sentence.sentence: 看醫生時別忘了帶健保卡。
example_sentence.pinyin: Kàn yīshēng shí bié wàngle dài jiànbǎokǎ.
example_sentence.english: Don't forget to bring your health insurance card when seeing a doctor.

example_sentence.sentence: 拿著處方箋去藥局領藥。
example_sentence.pinyin: Názhe chǔfāngjiān qù yàojú lǐng yào.
example_sentence.english: Take the prescription to the pharmacy to get the medicine.

example_sentence.sentence: 記得按時吃藥，多喝水。
example_sentence.pinyin: Jìdé ànshí chī yào, duō hē shuǐ.
example_sentence.english: Remember to take your medicine on time and drink plenty of water.

example_sentence.sentence: 在城市裡租屋的開銷很大。
example_sentence.pinyin: Zài chéngshì lǐ zūwū de kāixiāo hěn dà.
example_sentence.english: Renting a house in the city is very expensive.

example_sentence.sentence: 房東人很好，有問題都會幫忙處理。
example_sentence.pinyin: Fángdōng rén hěn hǎo, yǒu wèntí dōu huì bāngmáng chǔlǐ.
example_sentence.english: The landlord is very nice and helps handle any problems.

example_sentence.sentence: 新來的房客是個大學生。
example_sentence.pinyin: Xīn lái de fángkè shì ge dàxuéshēng.
example_sentence.english: The new tenant is a university student.

example_sentence.sentence: 租房子通常要付兩個月的押金。
example_sentence.pinyin: Zū fángzi tōngcháng yào fù liǎng gè yuè de yājīn.
example_sentence.english: Renting an apartment usually requires a two-month deposit.

example_sentence.sentence: 每個月五號要記得交租金。
example_sentence.pinyin: Měi gè yuè wǔ hào yào jìdé jiāo zūjīn.
example_sentence.english: Remember to pay the rent on the 5th of every month.

example_sentence.sentence: 夏天冷氣開太多，水電費會很貴。
example_sentence.pinyin: Xiàtiān lěngqì kāi tài duō, shuǐdiànfèi huì hěn guì.
example_sentence.english: Running the AC too much in summer will make the utility bills very expensive.

example_sentence.sentence: 在台灣要追垃圾車丟垃圾。
example_sentence.pinyin: Zài Táiwān yào zhuī lèsèchē diū lèsè.
example_sentence.english: In Taiwan, you have to chase the trash truck to throw away garbage.

example_sentence.sentence: 寶特瓶和紙類都要分類回收。
example_sentence.pinyin: Bǎotèpíng hé zhǐlèi dōu yào fēnlèi huíshōu.
example_sentence.english: Plastic bottles and paper must be sorted for recycling.

example_sentence.sentence: 如果遺失錢包，可以去警察局報案。
example_sentence.pinyin: Rúguǒ yíshī qiánbāo, kěyǐ qù jǐngchájú bào'àn.
example_sentence.english: If you lose your wallet, you can go to the police station to report it.

example_sentence.sentence: 我對這區不熟，差點迷路了。
example_sentence.pinyin: Wǒ duì zhè qū bù shú, chàdiǎn mílù le.
example_sentence.english: I'm not familiar with this area and almost got lost.

example_sentence.sentence: 看手機地圖導航很方便。
example_sentence.pinyin: Kàn shǒujī dìtú dǎoháng hěn fāngbiàn.
example_sentence.english: It's convenient to use a mobile map for navigation.

example_sentence.sentence: 你走錯方向了，郵局在反方向。
example_sentence.pinyin: Nǐ zǒu cuò fāngxiàng le, yóujú zài fǎn fāngxiàng.
example_sentence.english: You're going the wrong way; the post office is in the opposite direction.

example_sentence.sentence: 在下一個路口往左轉。
example_sentence.pinyin: Zài xià yīgè lùkǒu wǎng zuǒzhuǎn.
example_sentence.english: Turn left at the next intersection.

example_sentence.sentence: 看到超商後右轉就到了。
example_sentence.pinyin: Kàndào chāoshāng hòu yòuzhuǎn jiù dào le.
example_sentence.english: Turn right after seeing the convenience store and you're there.

example_sentence.sentence: 沿著這條路直走五分鐘。
example_sentence.pinyin: Yánzhe zhè tiáo lù zhízǒu wǔ fēnzhōng.
example_sentence.english: Go straight along this road for five minutes.

example_sentence.sentence: 過馬路時要看紅綠燈。
example_sentence.pinyin: Guò mǎlù shí yào kàn hóng lǜ dēng.
example_sentence.english: Look at the traffic lights when crossing the road.

example_sentence.sentence: 紅燈停，綠燈行。
example_sentence.pinyin: Hóngdēng tíng, lǜdēng xíng.
example_sentence.english: Red light stop, green light go.

example_sentence.sentence: 他在十字路口等我。
example_sentence.pinyin: Tā zài shízìlùkǒu děng wǒ.
example_sentence.english: He is waiting for me at the intersection.

example_sentence.sentence: 過這座橋就到市中心了。
example_sentence.pinyin: Guò zhè zuò qiáo jiù dào shì zhōngxīn le.
example_sentence.english: Cross this bridge and you'll be in the city center.

example_sentence.sentence: 超市的生鮮水果比較便宜。
example_sentence.pinyin: Chāoshì de shēngxiān shuǐguǒ bǐjiào piányí.
example_sentence.english: Fresh fruit at the supermarket is relatively cheaper.

example_sentence.sentence: 早上可以去菜市場買到新鮮的魚。
example_sentence.pinyin: Zǎoshàng kěyǐ qù càishìchǎng mǎidào xīnxiān de yú.
example_sentence.english: You can buy fresh fish at the traditional market in the morning.

example_sentence.sentence: 我週末喜歡去購物中心逛逛。
example_sentence.pinyin: Wǒ zhōumò xǐhuān qù gòuwù zhòngxīn guàngguàng.
example_sentence.english: I like to go to the shopping mall on weekends.

example_sentence.sentence: 請問可以在櫃檯直接付款嗎？
example_sentence.pinyin: Qǐngwèn kěyǐ zài guìtái zhíjiē fùkuǎn ma?
example_sentence.english: Can I pay directly at the counter?

example_sentence.sentence: 這家店可以使用信用卡結帳。
example_sentence.pinyin: Zhè jiā diàn kěyǐ shǐyòng xìnyòngkǎ jiézhàng.
example_sentence.english: This store accepts credit cards for checkout.

example_sentence.sentence: 這家小店只收現金。
example_sentence.pinyin: Zhè jiā xiǎo diàn zhǐ shōu xiànjīn.
example_sentence.english: This small shop only accepts cash.

example_sentence.sentence: 我的悠遊卡餘額不足，需要儲值。
example_sentence.pinyin: Wǒ de yōuyóukǎ yú'é bùzú, xūyào chǔzhí.
example_sentence.english: My EasyCard balance is low and needs topping up.

words.definition: to top up; to add value

example_sentence.sentence: 去便利商店儲值一百元。
example_sentence.pinyin: Qù biànlì shāngdiàn chǔzhí yī bǎi yuán.
example_sentence.english: Go to the convenience store to top up 100 dollars.

example_sentence.sentence: 請給我收據，謝謝。
example_sentence.pinyin: Qǐng gěi wǒ shōujù, xièxiè.
example_sentence.english: Please give me the receipt, thank you.

example_sentence.sentence: 在台灣，發票可以對獎。
example_sentence.pinyin: Zài Táiwān, fāpiào kěyǐ duìjiǎng.
example_sentence.english: In Taiwan, receipts can be used for the lottery.

example_sentence.sentence: 你有一件包裹寄到了。
example_sentence.pinyin: Nǐ yǒu yī jiàn bāoguǒ jì dào le.
example_sentence.english: A package has arrived for you.

example_sentence.sentence: 我想寄信給遠方的朋友。
example_sentence.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng jìxìn gěi yuǎnfāng de péngyǒu.
example_sentence.english: I want to mail a letter to a friend far away.

example_sentence.sentence: 快遞通常隔天就會送到。
example_sentence.pinyin: Kuàidì tōngcháng gétiān jiù huì sòng dào.
example_sentence.english: Express delivery usually arrives the next day.

example_sentence.sentence: 這間餐廳很有名，建議先預約。
example_sentence.pinyin: Zhè jiān cāntǐng hěn yǒumíng, jiànyì xiān yùyuē.
example_sentence.english: This restaurant is very famous; it's recommended to make a reservation first.

example_sentence.sentence: 辦理業務時需要身分證明。
example_sentence.pinyin: Bànlǐ yèwù shí xūyào shēnfèn zhèngmíng.
example_sentence.english: Identification is required when processing business.

example_sentence.sentence: 超商可以影印文件。
example_sentence.pinyin: Chāoshāng kěyǐ yǐngyìn wénjiàn.
example_sentence.english: Documents can be photocopied at convenience stores.

example_sentence.sentence: 現在很少人用傳真機了。
example_sentence.pinyin: Xiànzài hěn shǎo rén yòng chuánzhēnjī le.
example_sentence.english: Very few people use fax machines now.
